summary: Plan-mode classification only. #87599 is routed to central security handling because the job explicitly marks it as a security-signal ref and the hydrated review describes an authorization/session-state contract decision. #87830 stays open as related but not duplicate: it concerns stale invalid Kiro persistent-session recovery rather than explicit restore of a still-valid Claude backend session after metadata cleanup. No close, merge, or fix action is planned.

actions.reason: Route only #87599 to central OpenClaw security handling; do not close or fix it through Clownfish backlog cleanup.
Keep #87830 open as a related non-security bug/follow-up cluster; no closure is safe because it has unique reproduction scope and no hydrated candidate fix.
